title: PVP  REFORGED
description: Designed for serious competitive play, PVP REFORGED overhauls Minecraft's combat and visuals, delivering improved FPS, critical utility features, and a fresh yet focused environment for skillful PVP duels.
body:
⚔️ PVP REFORGED:

Version 1.0:

The Optimization Features:

Added Sodium (or an equivalent performance mod) for massive FPS improvements.

Integrated BetterFPS and Fastload to minimize load times and reduce stuttering during combat.

Introduced a Keystrokes Mod (Client-side) to visually display inputs during recordings or streams.(lunar only)

Refinements & Tweaks:

Updated the core HUD/Interface Mod to a cleaner, less intrusive design (e.g., removing non-essential elements).

Modified the FOV settings and removed dynamic FOV changes to maintain a consistent combat view.

Adjusted the configuration of Replay Mod to default to lower recording quality, saving disk space (users can still adjust it).

PVP REFORGED is the ultimate modpack for competitive Minecraft players, focusing on refining the player-versus-player experience. Dive into enhanced combat with optimized performance, a streamlined interface, and a collection of mods carefully selected to give you the winning edge. With the iconic shield and sword symbolizing the fiery clashes and strategic defense awaiting you, PVP REFORGED is your arsenal for domination.
